creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Reference [1], since this doesn't seem to be FreeBSD-specific, but more related to using ccache. This may explain why I could personally get this to build the first time, but not subsequently back then, and why the package builders worked. It still seems suspicious, since I just ran this twice now on a ccache-enabled system with 32 parallel jobs going and got no build errors.

[1] https://bugs.gentoo.org/933368
